creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
If that's the case, can you please do to the following to make it up to date and comply with current standards of ports?

* Add GitHub to MASTER_SITES
* Update WWW which currently is broken (and since (www.)keltia.net also doesn't work I got the impression that it was abandonware)
* Define LICENSE_FILE
  https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/porters-handbook/book/#licenses-license
* Update port to use DISTVERSION instead of PORTVERSION?
  https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/porters-handbook/book/#porting-pkgname
* Define CONFIGURE_ARGS once (use \)

Best regards,
Daniel
